command: LAST=$(git -C "$(pwd)" log -1 --format='%ct' 2>/dev/null || echo 0); NOW=$(date +%s); [ $((NOW - LAST)) -lt 300 ] && ssh fedora-local 'cd ~/apps/tabario/edit-videos && docker compose up --build --no-deps -d video-merger temporal-worker && docker exec video-editor-video-merger-1 python3 -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short' &
